name: Molecular Docking (Virtual Screening)
description: Molecular docking predicts how ligands bind a target: the receptor is prepared, ligand poses are generated and placed in the binding site, scored for affinity, resampled when poor, ranked, and iterated over a library to shortlist virtual-screening hits.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Target + ligand library"]
    N2["Prepare receptor + grid"]
    N3["Generate ligand poses"]
    N4["Place pose in site"]
    N5["Score binding affinity"]
    N6{"Clashes / low score?"}
    N7["Resample pose"]
    N8["Rank top poses"]
    N9{"More ligands?"}
    N10["Next ligand"]
    N11["Hit shortlist"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N5 --> N6
    N6 -->|yes| N7
    N7 -->|resample| N4
    N6 -->|no| N8
    N8 --> N9
    N9 -->|yes| N10
    N10 -->|dock next| N3
    N9 -->|no| N11

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N10 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N11 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

sources.title: Development and validation of a genetic algorithm for flexible docking (GOLD)
sources.authors: Jones, G.; Willett, P.; Glen, R. C.; Leach, A. R.; Taylor, R.

sources.title: Docking and scoring in virtual screening for drug discovery
sources.authors: Kitchen, D. B.; Decornez, H.; Furr, J. R.; Bajorath, J.

sources.title: AutoDock Vina: improving the speed and accuracy of docking

notes: Source-grounded extraction (v2): node content derived from cited protocol literature with per-node provenance; topology reflects the actual procedure.

flowchartStandard.name: source_grounded_extraction_v2
flowchartStandard.sourceGrounding: Nodes, decisions, branches, and loops were extracted from the cited sources; each node carries a sourceRef to its supporting citation. Awaiting human spot-check before verified=true.
